title: monogynella lupuliformis
side_effects: Monogynella lupuliformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps due to its high levels of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts has also been linked to kidney damage and liver failure in some individuals. In rare cases, improper use of Monogynella lupuliformis has been associated with allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the plant to avoid these potential side effects.
